name: @rntme/identity-clerk
description: Clerk implementation of the rntme Identity canonical contract.

scripts.test:conformance:mock: bun run build:deps && bun test test/conformance.mock.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:deps && tsc -p tsconfig.check.json --types bun
scripts.build:deps: bun run --cwd ../../../packages/contracts/_common/v1 build && bun run --cwd ../../../packages/contracts/identity/v1 build && bun run --cwd ../conformance build
